creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the bug report. I have not applied the patch, but performed the update myself (but have given credit for your submission and adjusted the URL as suggested by you).

It is ot necessary to submit bug reports and patches for jujutsu port updates, since I always create the update myself, after receiving the information that a new release exists from portscout.

It took me a bit longer than usual since I first had to update my poudriere jails after the EoL of FreeBSD-14.1 on April 1st (as a pre-requisite for "poudriere testport").
